name: ACAC Fitness & Wellness Center- Albemarle Square
description: ACAC Fitness & Wellness Center- Albemarle Square is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Charlottesville, VA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
